creator: root@nihil.plaut.de
text:
The installation of Oracle8i v.2 (8.1.6) triggers a bug in the linuxerator.
Actually the bug is triggered by the built-in IBM-Java-JRE 1.1.8 which shows
while trying to execute a java program endless 'kernel trap 9 with interrupts disabled'
and two 'sigaltstack: too few memory' on the console.

Fix: 

unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
Just download Oracle8i v.2 (8.1.6) for linux from http://otn.oracle.com (288MB)
and try to install.
